# cloudfly_images (Data Source)

Lists all available CloudFly instance images.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `images` (Attributes List) List of available images. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--images))

<a id="nestedatt--images"></a>
### Nested Schema for `images`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Image ID (UUID).
- `name` (String) Image display name.
